creator: rflynn@acsalaska.net
text:
Hi,

xcb is not an explicit dependency of libwncheck (it's pulled in by
libXres -> libX11), but libtool has decided it should link with it
regardless. It's not something the ports system can currently fix,
without fixing libtool.

You should be able to forcibly reinstall libwncheck and continue from there.
-- 
Mel
